title: Dog Walker Incident Report
text:
## Dog Walker Incident Report

**Date:** {day of week}, {number} PM

**Walker:** {person}

**Dog:** {adjective} {animal} named {person}

**Incident:** Client's {object} was {past-tense verb} after the dog {past-tense verb} toward a {adjective} squirrel.

**Witness statement:** A neighbor saw the leash {verb ending in -ing} around a {color} {vehicle}.

**Injuries:** One scraped {body part} and {number} treats lost.

**Corrective action:** Walker will {verb} more {adverb} and avoid the {place} until further notice.

**Owner response:** Sent a {adjective} email and one bag of {food}.
